description: Fix test failures caused by working directory changes during test execution. Ensure that tests that modify the current working directory properly restore it, and make PostgreSQL initialization code independent of the current working directory to prevent cascading test failures.
functional_requirements: Modify cargo_config tests to restore the original working directory after changing it
Update PostgreSQL initialization code to work correctly regardless of current working directory
Ensure tests can run in parallel without interfering with each other's working directory state
Fix all failing bgworker::pg::tests that were affected by working directory issues
